description_long: This is a modern, industrial-style truck with a low, rectangular profile and a large, ribbed cargo container mounted centrally on its chassis. The cab sections are positioned at both ends, each featuring angular windows and minimalistic detailing, suggesting a symmetrical, possibly autonomous or shuttle-like design. The body is predominantly white with gray and metallic accents, and the cargo area is marked with a large 'X' symbol and hazard stripes along the lower edge, indicating a utilitarian or specialized transport function. The truck rides on a set of small, black wheels, and the overall design is streamlined, with no visible external mirrors or traditional truck features. The surface appears to be made of metal panels, with some plastic or composite elements around the windows and trim. This vehicle is likely used for transporting goods or materials in urban or industrial environments, possibly within restricted or automated zones.
description: A low-profile, white and gray industrial truck with a large ribbed cargo container and dual cab sections at each end, featuring hazard stripes and minimalistic detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, the ribbed cargo container, dual cabs, and hazard stripes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting one cab section with angular window, hazard striping, and the end of the cargo container.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the other side of the truck and cargo container.
description_view_3: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the second cab section and the end of the cargo container.
